name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America is a major U.S. payday and installment lender offering short-term loans from $100–$2,000 in-store (same-day cash) or online across 22–28 states.
description_long:
Founded in 1997, Advance America is one of the largest storefront payday lenders in the United States, operating approximately 750 to 1,500 physical locations across 22 to 28 states. The company is headquartered in Spartanburg (also listed as Greenville), South Carolina, and operates under parent company Purpose Financial, which rebranded the entity around 2020. Advance America was acquired in 2012 by Mexican conglomerate Grupo Elektra for approximately $780 million. The company holds an A+ rating from the Better Business Bureau and became BBB accredited in 2024. It is state-licensed in every jurisdiction where it operates and is subject to federal oversight by the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.

Advance America's flagship product is the payday loan — short-term advances of $100 to $2,000 with 7 to 30-day repayment terms intended to bridge borrowers to their next paycheck. Beyond payday loans, the company offers installment loans with 3 to 12-month repayment schedules in select states, vehicle title loans secured by the borrower's car title, and revolving lines of credit up to approximately $4,000. In-store locations also handle check cashing and money orders. Applications are accepted in-person and online; in-store approvals can produce cash within roughly 30 minutes, while online approvals typically fund the next business day via ACH (sometimes same-day). Online applicants verify their bank through Plaid, and no application or upfront processing fee is charged at any stage.

As one of the nation's largest payday lending chains by storefront footprint, Advance America's primary differentiator is physical accessibility — hundreds of brick-and-mortar locations give same-day cash access to customers who prefer in-person service or lack reliable banking infrastructure. The company practices transparent fee disclosure, presenting all costs before loan signing and advertising no hidden fees. Its online portal at online.advanceamerica.net supports loan applications, account management, and payments by ACH or debit card, with live chat support available.

The most significant limitation is cost. Payday loan APRs typically run 300%–700%, and installment loan APRs range from 143%–348% — among the most expensive consumer credit products legally available. While Advance America holds an A+ BBB rating, consumer sentiment diverges sharply: its BBB customer review score is just 1.7 out of 5 across 154 reviews, with approximately 302 complaints filed over the past three years. This company is a last-resort option, appropriate only when lower-cost alternatives — credit union PALs, employer advances, personal loans — have been exhausted. Repeat borrowing at triple-digit rates can create debt cycles that compound the original financial shortfall.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee program found on website or in verified sources.

tiers.name: Payday Loans
features: In-store cash within ~30 minutes of approval
APR typically 300%–700% (e.g., 304.17% APR on $300 for 14 days in FL)
No application or upfront processing fee
Available in-store and online in qualifying states

tiers.name: Installment Loans
features: APR typically 143%–348% (e.g., 207.4% APR on $500 in FL)
Fixed scheduled payments over loan term

tiers.name: Title Loans
features: APR as low as 36% on loans over $5,000
Borrower retains use of vehicle during repayment

tiers.name: Lines of Credit
features: Borrow, repay, and re-borrow as needed

pros: Founded in 1997 — nearly 30 years operating as a licensed consumer lender
750–1,500+ storefront locations across 22–28 states for in-person same-day cash
In-store approval and cash disbursement in approximately 30 minutes
A+ BBB rating with accreditation achieved in 2024
No application fees or upfront processing fees on any loan product
Multiple loan types available — payday, installment, title, and lines of credit
Online portal with Plaid-verified applications, payment management, and live chat support
cons: Payday loan APRs of 300%–700% make these among the most expensive legal borrowing options in the U.S.
BBB customer review score is just 1.7/5 across 154 reviews, with ~302 complaints filed in the past 3 years
Not available in all states — only 22–28 states depending on loan product
Maximum payday loan of $2,000 makes this unsuitable for needs beyond small emergency cash
High-cost repeat borrowing model is associated with debt cycles that worsen underlying financial instability
best_for: Individuals with poor or no credit who cannot qualify for a bank personal loan or credit union product
Consumers facing a genuine small-dollar cash emergency (medical copay, utility shutoff, car repair) in a state where Advance America operates
Borrowers who need in-person, same-day cash and have no access to lower-cost alternatives
Existing Advance America customers in states with relatively more regulated fee structures
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for borrowers with poor credit who face an urgent, small-dollar cash shortfall and have exhausted lower-cost alternatives like credit union payday alternative loans or employer advances. With payday loan APRs running 300%–700% and a BBB customer review score of 1.7/5, the primary caveat is steep cost and mixed service quality — this is a last-resort product, not a routine financial tool.
services: Installment Loans (3–12 month terms, select states)
Revolving Lines of Credit (up to ~$4,000, select states)
In-store loan applications with same-day cash
Online loan applications with next-business-day ACH funding
ACH and debit card payment processing

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
